title: Managing multiple creative passions in a world that tells you to specialize
speakers: Lauren Hom (Lettering Artist & Designer, Hom Sweet Hom)
key_points: Drawing on her 15-year career as a lettering artist and designer, Lauren Hom shares how she has sustained multiple creative passions rather than narrowing to a single discipline.
The talk pushes back against the common industry pressure to specialize, presenting a case for embracing a multi-passion creative path.
Hom frames her experience as guidance for managing and balancing several creative interests over the long term of a career.
